name: rider-mcp-enforcer
description: Token-efficient tooling for large Unreal C++/Unity/.NET projects: search the codebase through JetBrains Rider's index instead of grep, and analyze huge editor logs — both at ~99% fewer tokens.

plugins.name: rider-mcp-enforcer
plugins.description: Force Claude Code to use Rider's MCP symbol/reference/file index instead of Bash grep, with token-flood summarization.

plugins.name: ue-log-analyzer
plugins.description: Token-efficient editor-log analysis (Unreal/Unity/generic): parse, dedup, classify by severity/category, callsite rollup, and decisive-field extraction. No IDE required.
